Description:
Provides functionality to control and manage a Lottie animation player in a Blazor application.
Remarks: This class interacts with a JavaScript module to initialize, play, pause, and stop Lottie animations within a specified HTML element. It also implements asynchronous disposal to clean up resources. WARNING: This class does not load lottie javascript files, you must load those yourself or use the component.

PublicProperties.Name: CurrentFrame
PublicProperties.Description: The current time/frame as reported back after EventFrame events.

PublicProperties.Name: TotalFrames
PublicProperties.Description: The total number of frames in the animation as returned by AnimationReady

Methods.Name: InitializeAsync
Methods.Description:
Initializes the Lottie player with the specified playback options.
Remarks: This method imports the required JavaScript module and invokes the initialization logic for the Lottie player. It also ensures that the instance is not disposing and that the JavaScript runtime is available before loading the module.

Methods.Name: PauseAsync
Methods.Description: Pauses the currently playing Lottie animation.

Methods.Name: StopAsync
Methods.Description: Stops the currently playing Lottie animation.

Methods.Name: GoToAndPlay
Methods.Description: Moves the animation to the specified frame and starts playback from that point.

Methods.Name: GoToAndStop
Methods.Description: Moves the animation to the specified frame and stops playback at that point.

Methods.Name: SetSpeedAsync
Methods.Description: Asynchronously sets the speed for the associated animation. 1 is normal speed, 2 is double speed, 0.5 is half speed, etc.

Methods.Name: SetDirectionAsync
Methods.Description: Asynchronously sets the playback direction for the associated animation.

Methods.Name: ExecuteActionAsync
Methods.Description: Executes javascript directly from the Lottie animation reference. So you can call any method that is available on the Lottie animation object.

Methods.Name: AnimationReadyEvent
Methods.Description: Invokes the OnAnimationReady event when the animation is ready. (DOMLoaded)

Methods.Name: DOMLoadedEvent
Methods.Description: Invokes the OnDOMLoaded event when the DOM is fully loaded with the Lottie animation.

Methods.Name: CompleteEvent
Methods.Description:
Invokes the OnComplete event when the animation completes.
Remarks: This event is triggered when the animation has finished playing all frames and loops, if applicable. If it's set to loop indefinitely, this event will never be triggered.

Methods.Name: LoopCompleteEvent
Methods.Description: Invokes the OnLoopComplete event when a loop completes.

Methods.Name: EnterFrameEvent
Methods.Description: Invokes the OnEnterFrame event with the specified arguments.
